Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User is registered and knows their username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "testpassword" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: User is successfully logged in to the device.

Title: Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User is registered and knows their username.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User enters "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Empty Username
Preconditions: User is registered and knows their password.
Test Steps:
1. User leaves the username field empty.
2. User enters "testpassword" in the password field.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Empty Password
Preconditions: User is registered and knows their username.
Test Steps:
1. User enters "testuser" in the username field.
2. User leaves the password field empty.
3. User clicks the login button.
Expected Result: Login fails and an error message is displayed.

Title: Device Connection
Preconditions: Device is available and user is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the "Connect" button with Device ID 12345.

Title: Device Disconnection
Preconditions: Device is connected and user is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the "Disconnect" button with Device ID 12345.

Title: Successful Addition of Device
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to add devices.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add Devices" button.
2. User enters "67890" in the device ID field.
3. User clicks the "Submit" button.

Title: Invalid Device ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to add devices.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add Devices" button.
2. User enters "abcde" in the device ID field.
3. User clicks the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the device ID is invalid.

Title: Empty Device ID
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to add devices.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add Devices" button.
2. User leaves the device ID field empty.
3. User clicks the "Submit" button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating that the device ID cannot be empty.

Title: System Interaction Flow
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to interact with the system.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Add Devices" button.
2. User enters a valid device ID.
3. User clicks the "Submit" button.
4. User clicks the "Connect" button.
5. User clicks the "Disconnect" button.
Expected Result: The system processes the device addition, connection, and disconnection requests successfully. <|EOF|>
